LLT.Settings.Enabled.Name: Enable Token Light Tooltip
LLT.Settings.Enabled.Hint: Show the light category tooltip when hovering tokens.
LLT.Settings.ThresholdDim.Name: Darkness Threshold: Dim → Normal
LLT.Settings.ThresholdDim.Hint: Global darkness level at which lighting changes from Dim to Normal (0.0 - 1.0). Default: 0.75
LLT.Settings.ThresholdDarkness.Name: Darkness Threshold: Darkness → Dim
LLT.Settings.ThresholdDarkness.Hint: Global darkness level at which lighting changes from Darkness to Dim (0.0 - 1.0). Default: 0.95
LLT.Keybinding.Toggle.Name: Toggle Token Light Tooltip
LLT.Keybinding.Toggle.Hint: Enable/disable showing the token light tooltip.
